title: Cannot access my account
description: I keep getting an 'Invalid Credentials' error when trying to log in, even though I just reset my password yesterday.

title: Double charged for monthly subscription
description: My bank statement shows two charges of $15.99 on the 1st of the month. Please refund the duplicate charge.

title: How do I export my data?
description: I need to download all my previous invoices in a single PDF or CSV file. Is there a way to do this from the dashboard?

title: Mobile app crashes on startup
description: Ever since the last iOS update, the app crashes immediately after displaying the splash screen.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: It would be great if you could add a dark mode toggle to the dashboard. The current white background is too bright at night.

title: Request to delete account
description: I no longer need your services and would like my account and all associated data to be permanently deleted.

title: Missing item in recent order
description: Order #44591 arrived today, but the wireless mouse was missing from the box. The packing slip says it should be included.

title: Password reset link expired
description: I requested a password reset link but it said it was expired immediately after I clicked it in my email.

title: API rate limit exceeded unexpectedly
description: Our application is receiving a 429 Too Many Requests error, but our logs show we are well below our tier limit.

title: Need help changing email address
description: I don't see an option in the profile settings to update my email address. Can you assist me with this?

title: Typo on the pricing page
description: Just wanted to let you know there is a spelling mistake in the 'Enterprise' column on your public pricing page.

title: Slack integration stopped working
description: Notifications are no longer being sent to our Slack channel. I tried reconnecting the app but it didn't help.

title: Not receiving 2FA SMS codes
description: I am trying to log in but the two-factor authentication text messages are not coming through to my phone.

title: Dashboard loading very slowly
description: The main analytics dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load on Google Chrome. All other websites work fine.
